ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization (city, state/province) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organization's mission and goals */,
  "services" TEXT /* Services offered by the organization (e.g., HIV/AIDS treatment, counseling) */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population served by the organization (e.g., LGBTQ+, people living with HIV/AIDS) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the organization */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the organization */,
  "languages_supported" TEXT /* Languages in which the organization provides services */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information on the accessibility of the organization's facilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the organization was added to the directory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the organization's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_services FOREIGN KEY ("services") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., HIV/AIDS treatment, counseling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., medical, counseling, legal) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the service */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service was added to the directory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific service being reviewed */,
  "anonymity" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review is anonymous */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
